title: Unusual Portals
description: Turns Nether and End portals into eerie, glitched rifts in reality, like the game itself is breaking apart.
body:
~~**_You were never supposed to find this..._**~~


> Unusual Portals is a Minecraft resource pack that transforms Nether and End portals into eerie, glitched anomalies—like broken pieces of code the game forgot to hide. Inspired by the feeling of discovering something that shouldn't exist, this pack reimagines dimensional gateways as unstable rifts in reality, with glitchy visuals and unsettling vibes.




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Features**:

- ~~Nether Portal~~: Replaced with a static-like, corrupted look, as if the code is tearing apart.
  
- ~~End Portal~~: Looks like a cracked, frozen, unreal piece of code.

</details>

_Feel free to use in your own projects !_
____________________________________________________________________________________________

**Made for atmospheric, cursed, or ARG-style packs.**
